title: Formula IF greater than/lower than include text
excerpt:
Hi, 
Can I add a formula to write text based on number value? For example, if number is less than 50, insert text “Risk” but if number is more than 50, insert text “Low risk”.

posts.author: hayley.white (Hayley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Can I add a formula to write text based on number value? For example, if number is less than 50, insert text “Risk” but if number is more than 50, insert text “Low risk”.

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Hayley,

Sure. Try:

IF({Numbers}<50,"Risk","Low Risk")
